ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "sizing_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing chart (e.g., US, EU, UK, AU) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or market the sizing chart belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing chart */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard the sizing chart adheres to (e.g., ISO, ASTM) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the sizing chart was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sizing chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizings" (
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing */,
  "sizing_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sizing chart the sizing belongs to */,
  "generic_sizing" TEXT /* Generic sizing (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "city_beach_order_size" INTEGER /* City Beach order size */,
  "bust_cm" TEXT /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in cm */,
  "hip_to_knee_cm" TEXT /* Measurement from hip to knee in cm */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sizing can be customized */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the sizing information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizings_sizing_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("sizing_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) the product is made of */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color(s) of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is designed for (e.g., Kids, Adults) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is discontinued */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing the size belongs to */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the specific size available in inventory */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the specific size sold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product size was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_sizing_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_id") REFERENCES sizings ("sizing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the item belongs to */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size the item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the profile belongs to */,
  "bust_cm" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist_cm" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips_cm" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_cm" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_cm" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in cm */,
  "hip_to_knee_cm" INTEGER /* Measurement from hip to knee in cm */,
  "preferred_sizing_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred sizing chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the shipping address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the shipping address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
